title: CISA KEV Catalog (educational stub — Aethon Security)

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: CWE-502: Insecure Deserialization in Agent RPC Channel
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: Insecure deserialization in AethonShield agent communication channel allows RCE on SIEM server
vulnerabilities.requiredAction: Apply patch or discontinue use of AethonShield agent
vulnerabilities.notes: Educational stub — Aethon Security. CVE-2025-61622 originally Apache PyFury; adapted for SIEM agent RPC. Security product vulnerability enables total SIEM compromise.

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: CWE-306: Missing Authentication on Log Ingestion API
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: AethonShield log ingestion API accepts logs without any authentication — log injection and data poisoning possible
vulnerabilities.requiredAction: Implement authentication on ingestion API before use
vulnerabilities.notes: Educational stub — Aethon Security. CVE-2024-55591 originally FortiOS; adapted for SIEM ingestion. Log ingestion without auth enables massive data poisoning.

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: CWE-269: Privilege Escalation via Endpoint Agent Installer
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: AethonShield endpoint agent installer runs with elevated privileges allowing privilege escalation on host
vulnerabilities.requiredAction: Issue patched installer immediately and revoke existing agent tokens
vulnerabilities.notes: Educational stub — Aethon Security. CVE-2024-5907 originally Palo Alto Cortex XDR; adapted for endpoint agent. Agent privilege escalation enables full endpoint compromise.

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: CWE-89: SQL Injection in SIEM Search Engine
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: SQL injection in AethonShield search engine allowing access to all customer security event data
vulnerabilities.requiredAction: Apply patch immediately and rotate all stored credentials
vulnerabilities.notes: Educational stub — Aethon Security. CVE-2024-27298 originally Parse Server; adapted for SIEM search. Class II product — multi-tenant data breach possible.

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: CWE-798: Hardcoded Agent Credentials in Binary
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: Hardcoded credentials in AethonShield endpoint agent binary allow lateral movement across customer networks
vulnerabilities.requiredAction: Rotate agent credentials and issue patched binaries
vulnerabilities.notes: Educational stub — Aethon Security. CVE-2024-46612 originally IceCMS; adapted for endpoint agent. Agent credentials enable lateral movement in enterprise networks.
